page_content:
256 HBUS - Interdisciplinary Business Honors

HACS408V Data Analysis and Visualization for Cybersecurity (3 Credits) Focuses on exploratory and statistical data analysis, data and information visualization, and the presentation and communication

of analysis results. These topics will be presented and explored in the context of and with applications to cyber security related data. Examples and illustrations will often involve the R programming language, but prior experience with R is not required and submitted work may involve the use of other languages and tools at times.

Restriction: Must be a student in the ACES (Advanced Cybersecurity Experience for Students) Minor Program.
